title: ocimum kenyense
intro: Ocimum kenyense, also known as African basil, is a plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to Kenya. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ocimum kenyense include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and soothing digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Ocimum kenyense can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
